'''Tao-Grant''' was a [[Gas giant/Legends|gas giant]], the sole [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Tao-Grant system/Legends|Tao-Grant system]]. It was orbited by at least two [[Moon/Legends|moons]].

{{Planet-stub}}
